body:
This PR is a wip update on DG backend interface so that it is compatible with the wip ClimaCore interface.

`jh/tb/bickley_cmc` is a parallel working branch on CM end as oppose to `tb/bickley_cmc` on ClimaCore. The idea is to synchronize these two branches as frequently as possible so that the development on the two backends won't diverge.
title: update DG core interface (in compatible with wip ClimaCore interface) -> bickley jet

body: This PR builds out the first version of a ClimaCore backend.
title: Set up ClimaCore prototype interface & backend
